summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ALEXIS automotive diagnostics platform. All backend API endpoints are functioning correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend pages load properly with correct branding, LIVE status indicators, and context-specific ALEXIS greeting messages. Text-based conversation flow works across all diagnostic contexts.
passed_tests: Backend health check endpoint returns ALEXIS message
POST /api/session/start creates diagnostic session with live=true
POST /api/diagnostic/chat returns AI responses for all contexts (diagram_assistance, visual_inspection, symptom_audio_diagnostics)
Dashboard page loads with correct layout and SA Diagnostics/ALEXIS branding
Voice Diagnostics page loads with LIVE status and Symptom Diagnostics context
Visual Diagnostics page loads with LIVE status and Visual Inspection context
Wiring Diagrams Upload page loads with LIVE status and Diagram Assistance context
All pages show correct ALEXIS greeting messages based on their context
Text-based conversation flow works - send message and receive ALEXIS response
Camera/upload buttons visible on Visual Diagnostics page
PDF upload area visible on Wiring Diagrams page
Microphone buttons present on all diagnostic pages
Send buttons functional across all pages
